content.en:
"Nine Tribulations Blood Vine!"

Ye Tian had heard of this treasure, it was extremely rare, and almost no Origin Upper Realm Overlord would take it out and trade it.

It is naturally normal to be able to breed the Nine Tribulations Blood Vine here.

At this time.

The Desolate Blood Ancestor and the Ancient Golden Ancestor were fighting desperately for this Nine Tribulations Blood Vine, both wanting to snatch this treasure.

For them, this cut of the Nine Tribulations Blood Vine is the hope of a breakthrough!

But at this time.

A big hand broke through their blockade, grabbed the Nine Tribulation Blood Vine, and directly pulled the Nine Tribulation Blood Vine out of a mountain range, and then sealed it.

After all, this Nine Tribulations Blood Vine also contains terrifying energy, and it can be regarded as a kind of plant life, and it also has the ability to attack.

It was precisely because of this that the Desolate Blood Ancestor and the Ancient Golden Ancestor were not so easy to take away the Nine Tribulations Blood Vine.

But.

Ye Tian made a move, and this Nine Tribulation Blood Vine was naturally unable to resist.

The entire Nine Tribulations Blood Vine fell into Ye Tian's hands and was put away by Ye Tian.

For him, the Nine Tribulations Blood Vine is also useful, and it can also be used to cultivate the human race!

"Infinity Lord!"

When the Desolate Blood Ancestor saw Ye Tian, he was immediately annoyed.

This Nine Tribulations Blood Vine was his hope for a breakthrough, but it was snatched away by Ye Tian.

"Endless Lord, can you give us a face in the Desolate Ancient Heavenly Palace and trade this Nine Tribulations Blood Vine to me!" said the Desolate Blood Ancestor.

"I'm sorry, I also want this Nine Tribulation Blood Vine!"

The meaning of Ye Tian's words is obvious, if you want the Nine Tribulations Blood Vine, don't think about it.

The Desolate Blood Ancestor didn't dare to make a move against Ye Tian, because his strength was far inferior to Ye Tian now.

Even if he had a backer, the strength of the Wasted Ancestor far surpassed that of Ye Tian, but the Wasted Ancestor was not here now, and there was no way to help him.

Now, he should still be cowardly, otherwise Ye Tian will kill him, and he will not be able to escape.

Thinking that not long ago, Ye Tian still needed to use the Ancient Heavenly Palace to enter the ruins of reincarnation, he was overlooking Ye Tian at that time, but he didn't expect that his status would change so quickly.

Wow!

Gu Jinzu was very reckless and took his leave directly.

And the Desolate Blood Ancestor didn't dare to stay, and soon ran away.

Ye Tian didn't have the idea of killing them, there were so many Origin Upper Realm Overlords in the Eternal Beyond Land, if they were still fighting wildly with each other, there would not be many Origin Upper Realm Overlords in the Eternal Upper Realm.

The point is, they all have backers behind them, and if they really fall, they will definitely investigate at all costs, and he doesn't dare to guarantee that he won't be exposed.

So, there is still no need to kill them.

After the Desolate Blood Ancestor and the Ancient Golden Ancestor left, Ye Tian continued to look for resources in this area.

If you can give birth to the Nine Tribulation Blood Plant Vine here, maybe you can also give birth to other resource treasures, or find another Nine Tribulation Blood Plant Vine, that would also be a good harvest!

Soon.

He found a rift, and when he approached it, he made a new discovery.

"That's ......"

Ye Tian saw the Nine Tribulations Blood Vine.

"No, this is not the Nine Tribulation Blood Vine!!! Ye Tian was shocked, the normal Nine Tribulation Blood Vine is a blood-red vine, there are barbs on the vine, and there are some special patterns.

And although this vine looked very similar to the Nine Tribulations Blood Vine, and also had barbs, it still had scales on its body, and its size was many times larger.

"This should be an evolutionary body, let's call it the Ten Tribulations Blood Vine!" Ye Tian muttered.

This kind of Ten Tribulation Blood Vine will definitely be of great help to him, and he must get his hands on it.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian fought with this Ten Tribulation Blood Vine, I have to say that the Ten Tribulation Blood Vine is very strong, and the body is extremely strong, otherwise it would not be able to survive near the rift!

Ye Tian fought with him constantly, and it took a long time before he cut it off and took it away.

After that, he continued to search this area, but found no other Nine Tribulation Blood Vines.

Still, he found some Origin Blood Crystals here.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian changed places.

Time passed, and half of the time passed.

At this time.

Ye Tian still hasn't practiced the reincarnation treasure yet, but he is not too far away from practicing the reincarnation arcana.

And his other replica bodies are looking for resources everywhere, gathering these resources one by one, and the harvest is getting bigger and bigger.

this day.

Ye Tian came to a special place, and when he came here, he also saw several other Origin Upper Realm Overlords.

"It's them!"

Ye Tian saw several Origin Dao Ancestors.

These people have taken the third path and merged into the origin of the land on the other side of eternity, immortal and immortal, but their strength is not strong.

Of course.

Even if they don't die, they don't dare to be arrogant here, they are just immortal, they leave a trace of origin in the origin core of the land on the other side of eternity, if the body walking in the outside world is killed, it will take a long time to recover.

Moreover, once the body is killed, their harvest is gone!

"Guys, what kind of place is this?"

Ye Tian looked at a gray field of light in front of him and asked.

These Origin Dao Ancestors naturally recognized Ye Tian, after all, Ye Tian created the Fourth Path, who didn't know it!

"Endless Lord, this is the treasure land transformed by the Origin Ancestor's Soul Sea, although the Origin Ancestor is not taking the third path, and the will of the Origin Realm is not very strong, but he can be regarded as a half-step breakthrough success, and his physical body is still a half-step evolution, causing his Origin Realm will to also undergo a transformation. This treasure land is a special sea of will, which has given birth to a very precious resource - the will source fruit, once the will source fruit is refined, the will of the origin realm will be improved, and it is easier to sublimate. "

"Yes, it is very difficult for our Origin Dao Ancestor to improve the will of the Origin Realm, and the Will Source Fruit will help us a lot!"

"Lord of Endless, I advise you not to enter easily, it is very dangerous inside, if you accidentally enter the mortal area, it will be over!"

These Origin Dao Ancestors also reminded truthfully, which was very polite.

"I'm still interested in giving it a try!"

After speaking, Ye Tian went in.

And these Origin Dao Ancestors didn't care, they continued to heal, and waited for their injuries to recover before going in and breaking in.

......

Will within the sea.

Ye Tian came in, he found that this place was like pieces of fragments, and it was extremely chaotic, his own Origin Realm Will could not explore dozens of miles away here at all, such a little distance, it was no different from being completely suppressed, and it was even equivalent to having no Origin Realm Will!

It's not easy to find the Fruit of Will here!

"Let's copy the body first, let the copy body break through!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.
